headers.value: Content-Type, Origin, Accept, Authorization, Content-Length, X-Requested-With

data.name: commands
data.value:
{{setVar 'scripts' (array "local sum = 0
for i = 1, 10 do
  sum = sum + i
end
print('Sum:', sum)
local avg = sum / 10
print('Average:', avg)
if avg > 5 then
  print('Above midpoint')
else
  print('Below midpoint')
end" "local function factorial(n)
  if n <= 1 then return 1 end
  return n * factorial(n - 1)
end
for i = 1, 7 do
  print(i .. '! = ' .. factorial(i))
end
local big = factorial(10)
print('10! =', big)" "local fruits = {'apple', 'banana', 'cherry', 'date', 'elderberry'}
table.insert(fruits, 'fig')
for idx, val in ipairs(fruits) do
  print(idx, val)
end
table.remove(fruits, 2)
print('After removal:', #fruits, 'items')
print('Last:', fruits[#fruits])" "local scores = {math=92, science=87, history=74, english=95}
local total = 0
for subject, score in pairs(scores) do
  total = total + score
  print(subject .. ': ' .. score)
end
local gpa = total / 4
print('GPA:', gpa)
if gpa >= 90 then print('Honor roll') end" "local function isPrime(n)
  if n < 2 then return false end
  for i = 2, math.floor(math.sqrt(n)) do
    if n % i == 0 then return false end
  end
  return true
end
local primes = {}
for n = 2, 30 do
  if isPrime(n) then table.insert(primes, n) end
end
print(table.concat(primes, ', '))" "local stack = {}
local function push(v) table.insert(stack, v) end
local function pop() return table.remove(stack) end
push(10)
push(20)
push(30)
print('Top:', stack[#stack])
local val = pop()
print('Popped:', val)
print('Stack size:', #stack)" "local str = 'Hello, World! Lua is great.'
print('Length:', #str)
print('Upper:', string.upper(str))
print('Sub:', string.sub(str, 1, 5))
local replaced = string.gsub(str, 'great', 'awesome')
print('Replaced:', replaced)
local _, count = string.gsub(str, 'l', '')
print('Count of l:', count)" "local matrix = {{1,2,3},{4,5,6},{7,8,9}}
local transposed = {}
for i = 1, 3 do
  transposed[i] = {}
  for j = 1, 3 do
    transposed[i][j] = matrix[j][i]
  end
end
for i = 1, 3 do
  print(table.concat(transposed[i], ' '))
end" "local function fib(n)
  local a, b = 0, 1
  for _ = 1, n do
    a, b = b, a + b
  end
  return a
end
local seq = {}
for i = 0, 9 do
  table.insert(seq, fib(i))
end
print('Fibonacci:', table.concat(seq, ', '))" "local function map(t, fn)
  local result = {}
  for i, v in ipairs(t) do result[i] = fn(v) end
  return result
end
local function filter(t, fn)
  local result = {}
  for _, v in ipairs(t) do
    if fn(v) then table.insert(result, v) end
  end
  return result
end
local nums = {1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8}
local evens = filter(nums, function(x) return x % 2 == 0 end)
local doubled = map(evens, function(x) return x * 2 end)
print(table.concat(doubled, ', '))" "local Queue = {}
Queue.__index = Queue
function Queue.new() return setmetatable({data={}, head=1, tail=0}, Queue) end
function Queue:push(v) self.tail = self.tail+1; self.data[self.tail] = v end
function Queue:pop() local v = self.data[self.head]; self.head = self.head+1; return v end
function Queue:size() return self.tail - self.head + 1 end
local q = Queue.new()
q:push('a'); q:push('b'); q:push('c')
print('Size:', q:size())
print('Pop:', q:pop())
print('Size after pop:', q:size())" "local function bubbleSort(arr)
  local n = #arr
  for i = 1, n do
    for j = 1, n - i do
      if arr[j] > arr[j+1] then
        arr[j], arr[j+1] = arr[j+1], arr[j]
      end
    end
  end
  return arr
end
local data = {5, 3, 8, 1, 9, 2, 7, 4, 6}
bubbleSort(data)
print(table.concat(data, ', '))" "local function readCSV(s)
  local rows = {}
  for line in s:gmatch('[^\n]+') do
    local row = {}
    for field in line:gmatch('[^,]+') do
      table.insert(row, field)
    end
    table.insert(rows, row)
  end
  return rows
end
local csv = 'alice,30,eng\nbob,25,design\ncarol,28,pm'
local rows = readCSV(csv)
for _, r in ipairs(rows) do
  print(r[1], r[2], r[3])
end" "local EventEmitter = {}
EventEmitter.__index = EventEmitter
function EventEmitter.new() return setmetatable({listeners={}}, EventEmitter) end
function EventEmitter:on(event, fn) self.listeners[event] = fn end
function EventEmitter:emit(event, data)
  if self.listeners[event] then self.listeners[event](data) end
end
local emitter = EventEmitter.new()
emitter:on('data', function(d) print('Received:', d) end)
emitter:on('error', function(e) print('Error:', e) end)
emitter:emit('data', 'hello world')
emitter:emit('error', 'something went wrong')" "local function memoize(fn)
  local cache = {}
  return function(n)
    if cache[n] == nil then cache[n] = fn(n) end
    return cache[n]
  end
end
local fib
fib = memoize(function(n)
  if n <= 1 then return n end
  return fib(n-1) + fib(n-2)
end)
for i = 0, 10 do
  io.write(fib(i) .. ' ')
end
print()" "local function range(from, to, step)
  step = step or 1
  local t = {}
  for i = from, to, step do table.insert(t, i) end
  return t
end
local function reduce(t, fn, acc)
  for _, v in ipairs(t) do acc = fn(acc, v) end
  return acc
end
local nums = range(1, 10)
local product = reduce(nums, function(a, b) return a * b end, 1)
print('Product 1..10:', product)
local evens = range(2, 20, 2)
print('Even sum:', reduce(evens, function(a,b) return a+b end, 0))" "local function deepCopy(orig)
  local copy = {}
  for k, v in pairs(orig) do
    if type(v) == 'table' then
      copy[k] = deepCopy(v)
    else
      copy[k] = v
    end
  end
  return copy
end
local original = {name='Alice', scores={10,20,30}}
local copy = deepCopy(original)
copy.name = 'Bob'
copy.scores[1] = 99
print(original.name, original.scores[1])
print(copy.name, copy.scores[1])" "local function trim(s) return s:match('^%s*(.-)%s*$') end
local function split(s, sep)
  local parts = {}
  for part in s:gmatch('([^' .. sep .. ']+)') do
    table.insert(parts, trim(part))
  end
  return parts
end
local line = '  foo , bar , baz , qux  '
local parts = split(line, ',')
for i, p in ipairs(parts) do
  print(i, '"' .. p .. '"')
end
print('Count:', #parts)" "local function compose(...)
  local fns = {...}
  return function(x)
    local result = x
    for i = #fns, 1, -1 do
      result = fns[i](result)
    end
    return result
  end
end
local double = function(x) return x * 2 end
local addTen = function(x) return x + 10 end
local square = function(x) return x * x end
local transform = compose(double, addTen, square)
print(transform(3))
print(transform(5))" "local function retry(fn, attempts)
  local ok, err
  for i = 1, attempts do
    ok, err = pcall(fn, i)
    if ok then
      print('Succeeded on attempt', i)
      return true
    end
    print('Attempt', i, 'failed:', err)
  end
  return false, err
end
local result = retry(function(attempt)
  if attempt < 3 then error('not ready') end
  print('Done!')
end, 5)
print('Result:', result)")}}

[
  {{#repeat (len @scripts)}}
  {
    "id": "{{uuid}}",
    "name": "{{faker 'person.jobTitle'}}",
    "description": "{{faker 'food.description'}}",
    "script": "{{jmesPath @scripts (concat '[' @index ']')}}"
  }
  {{/repeat}}
]
